data.name: AlreadyExists
data.comment: E.g <Record / Field > Already Exists!

data.name: AtLeastOneSelection
data.value: Please Select At Least One Selection.

data.name: Between
data.comment: E.g <Field> Must be between <upper limit> and <lower limit>

data.name: ConfirmDeleteConditionMsg
data.value: Are you going to delete the search condition?

data.name: ContainValue
data.comment: E.g < Field> Must be <value1> or <value2>

data.name: DataNoReady
data.comment: Table Was Not Ready, Or the selected Rows was 0

data.name: DataNotDefine
data.comment: Eg. Data In <Table Name> Table Not Defined!

data.name: DataTypeError
data.comment: E.g <Field> Must <Positive value / Negative Value / Numeric / Alpha Numeric etc>

data.name: DateDDMMYYYYFormat
data.comment: E.g <Field >, Invalid Date Format. e.g. 28-02-2013!

data.name: DeleteConfirmation
data.value: Are you sure want to delete this record?

data.name: Deletemessage
data.value: Please Choose Yes to confirm delete

data.name: Duplicate
data.comment: E.g Duplicate <Record / Field / ID / Key >

data.name: Failed
data.comment: E.g <Updated / Added / Deleted > Failed!

data.name: FieldEmpty
data.comment: E.g <Field > Cannot Be Empty !

data.name: FieldFormatAlphanumericError
data.comment: E.g <Field > must in Alphanumeric Format!

data.name: FieldFormatNumericError
data.comment: E.g <Field > must in Numeric Format!

data.name: FinGoodsTransferActionStoped
data.value: Finished Goods Transfer Note {0}, {1} Not Allowed! Note Already Closed.
data.comment: Eg. Finished Goods Transfer Note <Note No>, <Add/Edit/Delete> Not Allowed! Note Already Closed.

data.name: FinGoodsTransferItemEmpty
data.value: No Items Found, At Least 1 Item Must Be Filled.

data.name: FinGoodsTransferItemQtyZero
data.value: Invalid Item No {0} Quantity, Transfer Quantity Must Greater Than 0.
data.comment: Eg. Invalid Item No <Item No> Quantity, Transfer Quantity Must Greater Than 0.

data.name: FinGoodsTransferMonthEndClosed
data.value: Finished Goods Transfer, {0} Not Allowed! Month-End Closing Already Run.
data.comment: Eg. Finished Goods Transfer, <Add/Edit/Delete> Not Allowed! Month-End Closing Already Run.

data.name: FinGoodsTransferPalletQtyZero
data.value: Invalid Pallet No {0} Quantity, Pallet Quantity Must Greater Than 0.

data.name: InvalidItemNo_ReceivedLot
data.value: Invalid Receiving Lot and Item, Existing Lot {0} for Specified Item {1} Not Found!
data.comment: Eg. Invalid Receiving Lot and Item, Existing Lot <Lot No> for Specified Item <Item No> Not Found!

data.name: InvalidPasswordUserName
data.comment: E.g Invalid User <User ID / Password>

data.name: MasterMaintenanceRecordNotFound
data.value: Invalid {0}, Record Not Found In Master Table.
data.comment: E.g. Invalid <Field>, Record Not Found In Master Table.

data.name: PleaseEnter
data.comment: E.g Please Enter <Field>!

data.name: RangeError
data.comment: E.g <Field> Must be <less than / greater than / equal to> <value>

data.name: RawMatlBaleUsageActionStoped
data.value: Bale Usage Situation Lot {0}, {1} Not Allowed! Lot Already Issues.
data.comment: Eg. Bale Usage Situation Lot <Lot No>, <Add/Edit/Delete> Not Allowed! Lot Already Issues.

data.name: RawMatlItemNotFound
data.value: Invalid Raw Material, Item No {0} Not Found.
data.comment: E.g Invalid Raw Material, Item No <Item No> Not Found.

data.name: RawMatlRequisitionActionStoped
data.value: Raw Material Requisition Lot {0}, {1} Not Allowed! Lot Already Received.
data.comment: Eg. Raw Material Requisition Lot <Lot No>, <Add/Edit/Delete> Not Allowed! Lot Already Received.

data.name: RawMatlRequisitionLotItemEmpty
data.value: No Items Found, At Least 1 Lot Item Must Be Filled.

data.name: RawMatlRequisitionLotReqBaleZero
data.value: Invalid Lot No {0} Bale, Requested Bale Must Greater Than 0.
data.comment: Eg. Invalid Lot No <Lot No> Bale, Requested Bale Must Greater Than 0.

data.name: RawMatlRequisitionLotReqWeightZero
data.value: Invalid Lot No {0} Weight, Requested Weight Must Greater Than 0.
data.comment: Eg. Invalid Lot No <Lot No> Weight, Requested Weight Must Greater Than 0.

data.name: RecordNotExists
data.comment: E.g <Record / Field > Does Not Exist!

data.name: Successfully
data.comment: E.g <Updated / Added / Deleted > Successfully!
